---
title: "Lotka-Volterra webR-Ready Simulation"
format: 
  dashboard:
    orientation: columns
server: shiny
---

```{r}
#| context: setup
#| include: false
library(shiny)
library(shiny.i18n)
library(tidyverse)
library(plotly)

# Initialize translator locally for the standalone file
i18n <- Translator$new(translation_json_path = "translation.json")
i18n$set_translation_language("de") # Set default language testing environment

# A classic, vectorized Runge-Kutta 4th Order numerical solver written in pure R.
# Designed to process inputs exactly like deSolve::ode.
rk4_pure <- function(y, times, func, parms) {
  out <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(times), ncol = length(y) + 1)
  out[1, ] <- c(times[1], y)
  colnames(out) <- c("time", names(y))
  
  current_y <- y
  
  for (i in 1:(length(times) - 1)) {
    t_curr <- times[i]
    t_next <- times[i + 1]
    h <- t_next - t_curr
    
    # Calculate the 4 standard RK4 increments
    k1 <- unlist(func(t_curr,          current_y,          parms))
    k2 <- unlist(func(t_curr + h / 2,  current_y + h * k1 / 2, parms))
    k3 <- unlist(func(t_curr + h / 2,  current_y + h * k2 / 2, parms))
    k4 <- unlist(func(t_next,          current_y + h * k3,     parms))
    
    current_y <- current_y + (h / 6) * (k1 + 2 * k2 + 2 * k3 + k4)
    out[i + 1, ] <- c(t_next, current_y)
  }
  return(out)
}

figure_theme <- theme_minimal()
```

## Column {width=22%}

```{r}
#| context: server
library(tidyverse)
library(plotly)
library(shiny)

# The core model remains identical
lv <- function (t, x, parms) {
  with(as.list(c(x, parms)),{
    dB <- a * B - b * R * B
    dR <- c * R * B - d * R
    list(c(dB, dR))
  })
}
parms  <- c(a = 0.1, b = 0.1, c = 0.1, d = 0.1)
times  <- seq(0, 200, by = 0.2)
y0     <- c(B = 1, R = 0.5)

simulate <- reactive({
  parms  <- c(a = input$lv_a,  b = input$lv_b, c = input$lv_c, d = input$lv_d)
  y0     <- c(B = input$lv_B0, R = input$lv_R0)
  
  # Swapped deSolve::ode out for our pure-R rk4 solver
  res    <- rk4_pure(y0, times, lv, parms)
})

output$lotkavolterra <- renderPlotly({
  res <- simulate()
  
  # Fetch dynamic translations for labels and group categories
  label_time      <- i18n$t("Time")
  label_abundance <- i18n$t("Abundance")
  label_prey      <- i18n$t("Prey")
  label_predator  <- i18n$t("Predator")
  label_pop       <- i18n$t("Population")
  
  lv_df <- res |>
    as.data.frame() |>
    rename(!!sym(label_prey) := B, !!sym(label_predator) := R) |>
    pivot_longer(cols = c(!!sym(label_prey), !!sym(label_predator)), 
                 names_to = label_pop, values_to = label_abundance) |>
    rename(!!sym(label_time) := time)

  if (input$lv_grid == FALSE) {
    gg <- lv_df |>
      ggplot(aes(!!sym(label_time), !!sym(label_abundance), color = !!sym(label_pop))) + geom_line() + 
      scale_color_manual(values=c("#69af22", "#009de0"))
 
  } else {
    
    # Simple peak detection utilizing translated group strings
    prey_peaks <- lv_df |>
      dplyr::filter(!!sym(label_pop) == label_prey) |>
      dplyr::slice(which(diff(sign(diff(!!sym(label_abundance)))) == -2))
    
    pred_peaks <- lv_df |>
      dplyr::filter(!!sym(label_pop) == label_predator) |>
      dplyr::slice(which(diff(sign(diff(!!sym(label_abundance)))) == -2))
    
    gg <- lv_df |>
      ggplot(aes(!!sym(label_time), !!sym(label_abundance), color = !!sym(label_pop))) + geom_line() + 
      scale_color_manual(values = c("#69af22", "#009de0")) +
      scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(n = 10),
        minor_breaks = scales::breaks_width(5)
      ) +
      scale_y_continuous(
        breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(n = 10)
      )

    lwd <- 0.3 # line width for peaks and equilibria
    
    gg <- gg + geom_vline(aes(xintercept = !!sym(label_time)), colour = "#009de0", linetype = "dotted", linewidth = lwd, data = pred_peaks)
    gg <- gg + geom_vline(aes(xintercept = !!sym(label_time)), colour = "#69af22", linetype = "dotted", linewidth = lwd, data = prey_peaks)
    
    gg <- gg + geom_hline(aes(yintercept = input$lv_a/input$lv_b), colour = "#009de0", linewidth = lwd, linetype = "dotted")
    gg <- gg + geom_hline(aes(yintercept = input$lv_d/input$lv_c), colour = "#69af22", linewidth = lwd, linetype = "dotted")

    ## Additional simulations processed via our custom rk4 engine
    parms  <- c(a=input$lv_a,  b=input$lv_b, c=input$lv_c, d=input$lv_d)
    y0 <- c(B = input$lv_B0, R = input$lv_R0)
    
    ## simulation with peakstepsize for prey
    npeaks <- nrow(prey_peaks)
    times_prey  <- c(0, seq(prey_peaks[[label_time]][1], prey_peaks[[label_time]][npeaks], length.out = 1 + 10 * (npeaks - 1)))

    res_prey <- rk4_pure(y0, times_prey, lv, parms)
    
    period1 <- res_prey |>
      as.data.frame() |>
      pivot_longer(cols=c("B", "R"), 
                   names_to = label_pop, values_to = label_abundance) |>
      rename(!!sym(label_time) := time) |>
      dplyr::filter(!!sym(label_pop) == "B") |>
      dplyr::filter(!!sym(label_time) > 0)
    
    period1[[label_pop]] <- label_prey
    
    ## simulation with peakstepsize for predator
    npeaks <- nrow(pred_peaks)
    times_pred  <- c(0, seq(pred_peaks[[label_time]][1], pred_peaks[[label_time]][npeaks], length.out = 1 + 10 * (npeaks - 1)))

    res_pred <- rk4_pure(y0, times_pred, lv, parms)
    
    period2 <- res_pred |>
      as.data.frame() |>
      pivot_longer(cols=c("B", "R"), 
                   names_to = label_pop, values_to = label_abundance) |>
      rename(!!sym(label_time) := time) |>
      dplyr::filter(!!sym(label_pop) == "R") |>
      dplyr::filter(!!sym(label_time) > 0)
      
    period2[[label_pop]] <- label_predator
    
    period <- bind_rows(period1, period2)
    
    gg <- gg + 
      geom_point(aes(!!sym(label_time), !!sym(label_abundance), color = !!sym(label_pop)), data = period, size = 0.8) +
      scale_color_manual(values=c("forestgreen", "#69af22", "navy", "#009de0"))
    
    query <- parseQueryString(session$clientData$url_search)

    if (!is.null(query$cheat) &&  "cheat" %in% names(query())) {
      gg <- gg + geom_text(aes(!!sym(label_time), !!sym(label_abundance), label = round(!!sym(label_abundance), 2), color = !!sym(label_pop)), 
        data=period, position = position_nudge(x = 4), size = 3, fontface = "bold")
    }
  }
  
  gg <- gg + theme(legend.position = "bottom") + figure_theme

  ggplotly(gg)
})

## --------- download functionality ----------------------
output$downloadData <- downloadHandler(
  filename = function() {
    paste("simulation-", format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d-%H%M%S"), ".csv", sep = "")
  },
  content = function(file) {
    res <- simulate()
    
    lv_df <- res |>
      as.data.frame() |>
      rename(Prey = B, Predator = R, Time = time)
    
    if (i18n$get_translation_language() == "en") {
      decimal_sep   <- "."
      column_sep    <- ","
    } else {
      decimal_sep   <- ","
      column_sep    <- ";"
    }
    
    write.table(lv_df, file, row.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE, 
                dec = decimal_sep, sep = column_sep)
  }
)
```

```{r}
inputPanel(
  h3(i18n$t("Initial Values")),
  tags$div(title = i18n$t("Abundance of prey at time t=0"),
           numericInput(
             "lv_B0", label = i18n$t("B0: Prey"), width="48%",
             value = 1.0, min = 0, max = 2, step = 0.1
           )),
  tags$div(title = i18n$t("Abundance of predator at time t=0"),
           numericInput(
             "lv_R0", label = i18n$t("R0: Predator"), width="48%",
             value = 0.5, min = 0, max = 2, step = 0.1
           )),
  h3(i18n$t("Parameters")),
  tags$div(title = i18n$t("Reproduction rate of phytoplankton (prey population)"),
           sliderInput(
             "lv_a", label = i18n$t("a: Reproduction rate prey"), 
             value = 0.1, min = 0, max = 1, step = 0.02
           )),
  tags$div(title = i18n$t("Grazing loss of phytoplankton (prey) due to consumption by daphnia (predator)"),
           sliderInput(
             "lv_b", label = i18n$t("b: Loss prey by grazing"), 
             value = 0.1, min = 0, max = 1, step = 0.02
           )),
  tags$div(title = i18n$t("Growth efficiency of daphnia (predator) via food intake"),
           sliderInput(
             "lv_c", label = i18n$t("c: Efficiency predator"), 
             value = 0.1, min = 0, max = 1, step = 0.02
           )),
  tags$div(title = i18n$t("Mortality rate of daphnia (predator)"),
           sliderInput(
             "lv_d", label = i18n$t("d: Mortality rate predator"), 
             value = 0.1, min = 0, max = 1, step = 0.02
           )),
  checkboxInput("lv_grid", i18n$t("Sample values"), value = FALSE),
  downloadButton("downloadData", i18n$t("Download"))
)
```

## Column {width=40%}

```{r}
plotlyOutput("lotkavolterra")
```
